subTitle: After his brother is medically tapped, a South African sibling seeks redemption in Zambia, paired with an endurance athlete from Louisiana. But vindication proves harder than expected.

subTitle: Several pairs of total strangers have to survive the extreme environment and dangerous wildlife of the wilderness, naked and afraid.
